quoted_text: BREAKING: President Trump announced that the Strait of Hormuz will remain open and said the U.S. will assume the role of “Guardian of the Hormuz Strait,” enforcing what he called an Iranian blockade while allowing all other nations free passage. He said the U.S. will seek reimbursement equal to 20% of cargo shipped to cover the cost of securing the vital waterway.

text:
Strait of Hormuz is strategically critical, but so is 🇵🇰's location.

Geography is an asset only if backed by rational policy. Otherwise, the next major geopolitical disruption could become a financial crisis.

#SOE #OOTT #Iran #KSE100 #PSX https://t.co/cBQlr6S0IF

Trump says Hormuz will remain open, with or without Iran.

He also says the US will guard the strait and should be reimbursed.

WTI jumped toward $75.
The S&P sold off.
The dollar caught a bid.

The headline says open.
The tape is pricing escalation.

NFA
#OOTT #macro

Marco Rubio (June 23): "No country is allowed to charge tolls or fees on an international waterway"

Donald Trump (Jul 13): "The U.S.A. will be [...] known as 'THE GUARDIAN OF THE HORMUZ STRAIT,' but as such [...] will be reimbursed, at the rate of 20% on all cargo shipped"

Strait of Malacca is equily critical!

How the things are evolving globally. We might see a breakdown in the global supply. The concept "globalization" will extinct. We are already entering a new of multipolar world.

I just realized this final fake deal will be absolutely incredible for the longs. Omg. Every time I've been a part of a fake move like this, that clears out all the longside and brings in more shorts, it's like rocket fuel for the consolidators who come in and scoop up all the liquidity.

This rally is going to be face-ripping. And it's even more likely to happen extremely soon now.
